mapper.sql: uc.user_coupon_id, uc.user_id, uc.coupon_id, uc.is_used, uc.used_time, uc.order_id, uc.create_time, c.coupon_name, c.discount_amount, c.min_amount, DATE_FORMAT(c.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as end_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_coupons (user_id, coupon_id, is_used) VALUES (#{userId}, #{couponId}, 0)
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM user_coupons uc LEFT JOIN coupons c ON uc.coupon_id = c.coupon_id WHERE uc.user_coupon_id = #{userCouponId}

SELECT
FROM user_coupons uc LEFT JOIN coupons c ON uc.coupon_id = c.coupon_id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY uc.is_used ASC, c.end_time ASC

SELECT
FROM user_coupons uc LEFT JOIN coupons c ON uc.coupon_id = c.coupon_id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.is_used = 0 AND c.end_time > NOW() ORDER BY c.discount_amount DESC

SELECT
FROM user_coupons uc LEFT JOIN coupons c ON uc.coupon_id = c.coupon_id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.is_used = 1 ORDER BY uc.used_time DESC

SELECT
FROM user_coupons uc LEFT JOIN coupons c ON uc.coupon_id = c.coupon_id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.is_used = 0 AND c.end_time <= NOW() ORDER BY c.end_time DESC
